steps.title: Check current opencost deployment
steps.description:
Verify your opencost version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost
helm list -n opencost 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opencost installation.

steps.title: Review opencost configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opencost configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost
kubectl get configmap -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opencost
```
Opencost is broken in k8s 1.25. Need to move from v2beta1 to v2

```
The Beta API version (autoscaling/v2beta1) of HorizontalPodAutoscaler is no longer served as of version 1.25. This API was deprecated in version 1.23.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support for k8s 1.25
steps.description:
## What does this PR change?
* Updates dependencies and K8s API references to support K8s v1.25

THIS IS WIP: Need to test further, especially on earlier K8s versions.

## How will this PR impact users?
* Support added for K8s v1.25 clusters.

## Does this PR address any GitHub or Zendesk issues?
*
```yaml
- image: quay.io/kubecost1/kubecost-cost-model:latest
```

steps.title: Upgrade opencost to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade opencost:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade opencost opencost/opencost --namespace opencost
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opencost
helm list -n opencost
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost
kubectl get events -n opencost --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support for k8s 1.25" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
⚠️ Note: This resolution was work-in-progress at the time of PR submission. ## What does this PR change?
* Updates dependencies and K8s API references to support K8s v1.25

THIS IS WIP: Need to test further, especially on earlier K8s versions.

## How will this PR impact users?
* Support added for K8s v1.25 clusters.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opencost installed or the issue environment reproducible.
